text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: 0mp

Log:
  MFC r367097:

  Correct USB HID item in examples

  It turns out that examples were incorrectly referring to Volume_Up
  and Volume_Down, which are not defined at all.

  PR:		250683

_U  stable/11/
